overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a stormy lakeshore at dusk. The character travels from sandy beach through marshy grassland toward an ancient stone bridge, with lightning illuminating the dark clouds above.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy lakeside beach with distant mountains

events.description: lightning bolt flashes across the dark storm clouds

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy shoreline with two swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: tall leafy tree on the left side of the beach
dark choppy water with whitecaps lapping the shore
mountain range visible across the lake under storm clouds
sandy shoreline along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy beach at dusk, with Geralt walking along the sandy shore. A large tree stands on the left while choppy dark water stretches to the right, with distant mountains visible across the lake. Lightning occasionally illuminates the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open shoreline with waves washing the sand

events.description: character turns slightly to follow the curve of the shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge where small waves wash over the sand

entered.detail: grass-covered slope rising from the beach on the left
shallow water washing over the sand near the shore

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the shoreline, the sandy beach curves gently with waves lapping at the water's edge. The grassy bank rises on the left while the character walks through shallow water, moving away from the initial tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: marshy riverbank with wildflowers and tall grass

events.description: ground transitions from sand to marshy grassland with shallow pools

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow water and tall grass along the marshy bank

entered.detail: tall green reeds and grass growing in shallow water
purple lupine flowers dotting the grassy bank
old stone arch bridge visible in the distance through the haze

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to a marshy riverbank where tall grass and wildflowers grow in shallow water. Dense trees line the left side while an old stone bridge becomes visible in the far distance. The character wades through the marshy ground toward the bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy path approaching ancient stone bridge

events.description: village buildings become visible beyond the stone bridge

agents.ego_description: walking up a grassy incline toward the stone bridge

entered.detail: cluster of buildings visible beyond the bridge in the distance
weathered wooden fence posts along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path becomes a grassy trail leading directly toward the ancient stone bridge. Dense foliage surrounds the path while the bridge looms larger ahead. A wooden fence appears on the right, and village buildings become visible in the distance beyond the bridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stormy lakeshore that gradually transitions from a desolate sandy beach into a lush, marshy approach to an ancient village. It begins with Geralt walking along the sandy shore beside a large tree, where choppy dark waters and distant mountains are intermittently illuminated by flashes of lightning. As the beach curves, the camera follows the character through shallow water and along a rising grassy bank, moving away from the coast. The scene then shifts into a marshy riverbank filled with tall grass and wildflowers, where the terrain becomes saturated and a stone bridge emerges in the far distance. Finally, the path evolves into a grassy trail flanked by dense foliage and a wooden fence, leading the camera directly toward the looming bridge and the village buildings beyond.
